name: messaging-core
author: GoCodeAlone
description: Shared messaging interfaces and step contracts for workflow platform messaging plugins (Discord, Slack, Teams).

stepSchemas.description: Sends a message to a platform channel. Implemented by each platform plugin (Discord, Slack, Teams).

configFields.label: Channel
configFields.description: Target channel ID or name to send the message to.

configFields.label: Message Text
configFields.description: Message body content. Template expressions are supported.

outputs.description: Unique identifier of the sent message.
True when the message was sent successfully.

stepSchemas.description: Sends a threaded reply to an existing message. Implemented by each platform plugin (Discord, Slack, Teams).

configFields.label: Channel
configFields.description: Channel ID or name that contains the parent message.

configFields.label: Parent Message ID
configFields.description: ID of the message to reply to.

configFields.label: Reply Text
configFields.description: Reply body content. Template expressions are supported.

outputs.description: Unique identifier of the reply message.
True when the reply was sent successfully.

stepSchemas.description: Reads the latest message event from a channel. Typically used after a messaging trigger to extract event details.

configFields.label: Channel
configFields.description: Channel ID or name to receive the message event from.

outputs.description: Platform event type (e.g. message_create, message_update, reaction_add).
ID of the channel the event occurred in.
ID of the user who triggered the event.

stepSchemas.description: Adds an emoji reaction to a message. Implemented by each platform plugin (Discord, Slack, Teams).

configFields.label: Channel
configFields.description: Channel ID or name containing the target message.

configFields.label: Message ID
configFields.description: ID of the message to react to.

configFields.label: Emoji
configFields.description: Emoji to add as a reaction (Unicode or platform-specific name).

outputs.description: True when the reaction was added successfully.
